name: sample-library-manager
description: Search your sample library by describing what you want. BPM/key detection, MIDI reading, and AI-powered organisation across multiple libraries.

tools.name: search_samples
tools.description: Search for audio samples and MIDI files across all configured libraries

tools.name: search_samples_by_bpm
tools.description: Search samples and detect BPM for each result

tools.name: list_libraries
tools.description: Show configured sample library locations and status

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List top-level folders across all sample libraries

tools.name: count_samples_in_folder
tools.description: Count samples in a specific folder

tools.name: list_all_samples_in_folder
tools.description: List all samples in a folder

tools.name: analyze_sample
tools.description: Detect BPM and musical key of an audio sample

tools.name: read_midi
tools.description: Read a MIDI file and return notes in bar|beat format

tools.name: collect_samples
tools.description: Copy or move samples by keyword into a destination folder

tools.name: copy_samples
tools.description: Copy or move specific files by path into a destination folder

tools.name: collect_search_results
tools.description: Copy or move samples from last search results by number

tools.name: rename_with_metadata
tools.description: Rename samples by appending detected BPM and/or key

tools.name: add_library
tools.description: Add a sample library path at runtime

tools.name: remove_library
tools.description: Remove a sample library by name

libraries.title: Sample Library Paths
libraries.description: JSON object mapping library names to paths, e.g. {"My Samples": "/path/to/samples"}. Leave empty for auto-detection.
